keyFeatures.en: AI-powered music generation with customizable parameters (e.g., mood, genre, length)
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的音乐生成，可自定义参数（如情绪、流派、长度）

keyFeatures.en: Royalty-free music for commercial use without attribution requirements
keyFeatures.zh: 免版税音乐，可用于商业用途，无需署名

keyFeatures.en: Loop-based editing and seamless track exporting in multiple formats
keyFeatures.zh: 基于循环的编辑功能，支持多种格式的无缝音轨导出

description.en: Basic access with limited features for personal use
description.zh: 基础功能访问，适用于个人用途，功能有限

description.en: Full access to AI music generation, unlimited downloads, and commercial rights
description.zh: 完全访问AI音乐生成功能，无限下载，拥有商业使用权

description.en: Custom solutions for teams and organizations with advanced needs
description.zh: 为团队和组织提供定制解决方案，满足高级需求

weaknesses.en: Limited control over specific musical elements (e.g., instrument selection, chord progressions) compared to professional DAWs
weaknesses.zh: 与专业数字音频工作站相比，对特定音乐元素（如乐器选择、和弦进行）的控制有限

weaknesses.en: Potential lack of originality in AI-generated tracks, leading to repetitive or generic outputs
weaknesses.zh: AI生成的曲目可能缺乏原创性，导致输出重复或泛化

weaknesses.en: Dependence on internet connectivity for cloud-based generation and access
weaknesses.zh: 依赖互联网连接进行基于云的生成和访问

targetAudience.en: Content creators (e.g., YouTubers, podcasters, streamers), small businesses, and indie developers needing affordable, royalty-free background music
targetAudience.zh: 内容创作者（如YouTuber、播客主播、直播主）、小型企业和独立开发者，需要经济实惠、免版税的背景音乐

positioning.en: An accessible, AI-driven platform for generating custom, royalty-free music quickly and affordably, targeting non-musicians and budget-conscious creators
positioning.zh: 一个易于使用的AI驱动平台，快速且经济地生成定制化免版税音乐，面向非音乐专业人士和预算有限的创作者

keyFeatures.en: AI-powered music creation that allows users to generate original songs in seconds by selecting a style and customizing elements
keyFeatures.zh: AI驱动的音乐创作，用户可通过选择风格和自定义元素在几秒钟内生成原创歌曲

keyFeatures.en: Automated mastering and distribution to streaming platforms like Spotify and TikTok with one click
keyFeatures.zh: 一键自动母带处理和分发到Spotify、TikTok等流媒体平台

keyFeatures.en: Free tier with basic creation features and limited monthly credits for song generation
keyFeatures.zh: 免费套餐提供基本创作功能和有限的每月歌曲生成积分

description.en: Basic song creation, limited monthly credits, access to free sounds and styles, distribution to streaming platforms with revenue sharing
description.zh: 基本歌曲创作，有限的每月积分，免费音色和风格访问，可分发到流媒体平台但需收入分成

monthlyCredits.en: Not clearly stated (typically limited credits for song generation)
monthlyCredits.zh: 未明确说明（通常为有限的歌曲生成积分）

commercialUse.en: Allowed with revenue sharing on distributed tracks
commercialUse.zh: 允许，但对分发的曲目需收入分成

description.en: Enhanced features including more monthly credits, priority support, higher revenue share, and advanced customization options
description.zh: 增强功能包括更多每月积分、优先支持、更高收入分成和高级自定义选项

monthlyCredits.en: Not clearly stated (increased compared to Free tier)
monthlyCredits.zh: 未明确说明（相比免费套餐有所增加）

weaknesses.en: Limited control over AI-generated music quality and originality, which may result in generic-sounding tracks
weaknesses.zh: 对AI生成的音乐质量和原创性控制有限，可能导致曲目听起来较为普通

weaknesses.en: Revenue sharing model on free tier reduces earnings for creators, potentially discouraging professional use
weaknesses.zh: 免费套餐的收入分成模式减少了创作者收益，可能阻碍专业用途

targetAudience.en: Beginners and hobbyists looking to create music easily without technical skills, as well as content creators needing background tracks for videos
targetAudience.zh: 无需技术技能、希望轻松创作音乐的初学者和爱好者，以及需要视频背景曲目的内容创作者

positioning.en: Democratizing music creation by making it accessible and simple through AI, targeting non-musicians and casual creators
positioning.zh: 通过AI使音乐创作变得可访问和简单，从而民主化音乐创作，面向非音乐家和休闲创作者

keyFeatures.en: AI-powered music composition for various media projects
keyFeatures.zh: 为各类媒体项目提供AI驱动的音乐创作
生成原创、免版税的音乐曲目
用户友好的界面，支持可自定义参数

weaknesses.en: Lack of transparent pricing and feature details on public pages
weaknesses.zh: 公开页面缺乏透明的定价和功能详情

weaknesses.en: Potential limitations in music genre diversity or customization depth
weaknesses.zh: 音乐风格多样性或自定义深度可能存在限制

targetAudience.en: Content creators, filmmakers, game developers, and marketers needing original background music
targetAudience.zh: 需要原创背景音乐的内容创作者、电影制作人、游戏开发者和营销人员

positioning.en: An AI tool for accessible, efficient music composition without requiring musical expertise
positioning.zh: 一款无需音乐专业知识即可进行便捷高效音乐创作的AI工具

marketGaps.en: Offline functionality and advanced control for professional musicians who need detailed manipulation of musical elements without internet dependency
marketGaps.zh: 面向专业音乐人的离线功能和高级控制，无需依赖互联网即可详细操作音乐元素

marketGaps.en: Transparent pricing and high originality with revenue protection for creators, addressing concerns about generic outputs and unfair earnings
marketGaps.zh: 透明的定价和高原创性，保护创作者收入，解决输出内容泛化和收益不公平的担忧

marketGaps.en: Diverse genre support and deep customization options to cater to niche markets and specialized music production needs
marketGaps.zh: 多样化的流派支持和深度定制选项，以满足小众市场和专业音乐制作需求
